title: The Rise of Generative UI for Developers (CopilotKit)
summary: CopilotKit is a framework that enables developers to integrate AI agents directly into React and Next.js applications by rendering real UI components and sharing state, moving beyond bolted-on chatbot windows. The tool supports human-in-the-loop approval workflows and generative UI patterns.
writeup: This Better Stack video covers CopilotKit, a framework for embedding AI agents directly into React and Next.js applications by rendering real UI components and sharing application state, rather than relying on a separate chatbot window. It matters because it reframes how agents interact with a frontend: as participants in the interface itself instead of bolted-on overlays. Concrete takeaways include support for human-in-the-loop approval workflows and generative UI patterns, where the agent produces and drives actual components.
